Dialogue.Line: A wolf was seen limping near the school grounds, and the student rushes to help it.
A wolf! Oh, it seems to be injured. I need to help them.
When the wolf wakes, it suddenly transforms into a human, shocking the student.
Wait... Where did the wolf go? You—were you the wolf from earlier?
But that's impossible... You're one of those creatures that can transform, huh?
Don't worry, you're safe here. Do you remember where you came from?
